$comment: Source of truth for ADR-documented windyroad plugin renames. Per P059, the install-updates skill consumes this table to detect stale enabled-plugin keys (named under `from`) in current/sibling .claude/settings.json files and silently auto-migrate them to the canonical name (`to`) within already-confirmed siblings. Direct settings.json mutation is authorised by the ADR-030 Confirmation amendment when the rename is recorded here. Schema reserves `skill-action` for future rename-with-shim cases (forward-compat per architect Q2 advisory); current entries are all `replace` semantics.
